query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO news_articles (title, slug, content, category, is_breaking, is_featured, source, created_at) VALUES
('QUMUS Ecosystem Reaches 13 Autonomous Policies', 'qumus-13-policies', 'The QUMUS autonomous orchestration engine has expanded to 13 decision policies, covering content scheduling, broadcast management, emergency response, community engagement, and code maintenance. This milestone represents 90% autonomous operation with 10% human oversight — setting a new industry standard for Black-owned media technology platforms.', 'technology', false, true, 'QUMUS System', NOW()),
('RRB Radio Expands to 50 Channels with Live Streaming', 'rrb-50-channels', 'Rockin Rockin Boogie Radio has expanded its broadcasting network to 50 channels across 13 categories — music, healing, gospel, talk, community, culture, wellness, kids, operator, events, stream, emergency, and special programming. Each channel now features real audio streaming via SomaFM integration with automatic fallback handling and stream health monitoring.', 'broadcasting', false, true, 'RRB Editorial', NOW()),
('Sweet Miracles Foundation Launches Recurring Donation Program', 'sweet-miracles-recurring', 'The Sweet Miracles Foundation has launched its recurring donation program with monthly giving options. The new donation page features impact tracking, community statistics, and transparent reporting on how funds are allocated across education, community support, and legacy preservation programs.', 'community', false, false, 'Sweet Miracles Team', NOW()),
('Candy Hunter Archive Preserves Family Legacy in Digital Format', 'candy-archive-launch', 'The Candy Hunter Archive — a comprehensive digital preservation of the Seabrun "Candy" Hunter Sr. legacy — is now live within the QUMUS ecosystem. The archive features six sections: biography, RRB investigative sessions, collaboration timeline, evidence chain mapping, and documentary project documentation.', 'culture', false, false, 'Canryn Production', NOW()),
('HybridCast Emergency Broadcast System Passes Operational Test', 'hybridcast-operational', 'The HybridCast Emergency Broadcast PWA has successfully completed its latest operational test, demonstrating offline-first capability, mesh networking readiness, and QUMUS autonomous escalation.', 'emergency', true, false, 'HybridCast Team', NOW()),
('Selma Bridge Crossing Jubilee 2026 — RRB Broadcasting Live', 'selma-jubilee-2026', 'Rockin Rockin Boogie Radio will provide live broadcasting coverage of the 61st Annual Selma Bridge Crossing Jubilee, March 5-8, 2026. Channel 42 Live Events will carry continuous coverage of the commemoration.', 'events', false, true, 'RRB Events', NOW()),
('RRB Team Update Delivery System Goes Live', 'team-update-system', 'The RRB Team Update Delivery System is now operational, providing seamless update notifications via push notifications, email digests, webhook dispatch to Slack/Discord, and in-app changelog.', 'technology', true, true, 'QUMUS System', NOW());
command:
